testcase.name: test_crm_households

failure.message: AssertionError: assert False + where False = isinstance({'households': [{'created_at': '2023-06-15T10:00:00Z', 'email': 'michael.wheeler@email.com', 'household_id': 'hh_wheeler001', 'members': [{'age': 45, 'name': 'Michael Wheeler', 'occupation': 'Engineer', 'role': 'primary'}, {'age': 43, 'name': 'Sarah Wheeler', 'occupation': 'Teacher', 'role': 'spouse'}], ...}, {'created_at': '2024-01-20T14:30:00Z', 'email': 'david.chen@email.com', 'household_id': 'hh_chen002', 'members': [{'age': 38, 'name': 'David Chen', 'occupation': 'Doctor', 'role': 'primary'}, {'age': 36, 'name': 'Lisa Chen', 'occupation': 'Pharmacist', 'role': 'spouse'}], ...}, {'created_at': '2022-03-10T09:00:00Z', 'email': 'raj.patel@email.com', 'household_id': 'hh_patel003', 'members': [{'age': 52, 'name': 'Raj Patel', 'occupation': 'Business Owner', 'role': 'primary'}], ...}], 'total': 3}, list)

testcase.failure: tests/test_phase1_phase3.py:201: in test_crm_households assert isinstance(data, list) E AssertionError: assert False E + where False = isinstance({'households': [{'created_at': '2023-06-15T10:00:00Z', 'email': 'michael.wheeler@email.com', 'household_id': 'hh_wheeler001', 'members': [{'age': 45, 'name': 'Michael Wheeler', 'occupation': 'Engineer', 'role': 'primary'}, {'age': 43, 'name': 'Sarah Wheeler', 'occupation': 'Teacher', 'role': 'spouse'}], ...}, {'created_at': '2024-01-20T14:30:00Z', 'email': 'david.chen@email.com', 'household_id': 'hh_chen002', 'members': [{'age': 38, 'name': 'David Chen', 'occupation': 'Doctor', 'role': 'primary'}, {'age': 36, 'name': 'Lisa Chen', 'occupation': 'Pharmacist', 'role': 'spouse'}], ...}, {'created_at': '2022-03-10T09:00:00Z', 'email': 'raj.patel@email.com', 'household_id': 'hh_patel003', 'members': [{'age': 52, 'name': 'Raj Patel', 'occupation': 'Business Owner', 'role': 'primary'}], ...}], 'total': 3}, list)

testcase.name: test_crm_tasks

failure.message: AssertionError: assert False + where False = isinstance({'tasks': [{'assigned_to': 'adviser', 'category': 'review', 'description': 'Comprehensive annual review including portfolio performance, goals update, and strategy adjustment', 'due_date': '2026-03-19T23:37:37.770839+00:00', ...}, {'assigned_to': 'adviser', 'category': 'compliance', 'description': 'Review life and income protection insurance adequacy', 'due_date': '2026-03-26T23:37:37.770854+00:00', ...}, {'assigned_to': 'adviser', 'category': 'compliance', 'description': 'Prepare documents for annual SMSF audit', 'due_date': '2026-04-11T23:37:37.770858+00:00', ...}], 'total': 3}, list)

testcase.name: test_crm_meetings

failure.message:
AssertionError: assert False + where False = isinstance({'meetings': [{'agenda': '1. Portfolio review
2. Goals progress
3. Strategy adjustments', 'attendees': ['Michael Wheeler', 'Sarah Wheeler'], 'duration_minutes': 60, 'household_id': 'hh_wheeler001', ...}, {'agenda': '1. SMSF performance
2. Pension phase transition
3. Estate planning', 'attendees': ['Raj Patel'], 'duration_minutes': 90, 'household_id': 'hh_patel003', ...}], 'total': 2}, list)
